title: Mama Bhagne
desc: Raja, a lazy man, gets married to Payel under the assumption that she is from a wealthy family. However, he is shocked to learn that Payel's father is a gardener.

title: Praner Cheye Priyo
desc: A couple's life falls to ruin when Chaiti, a sinister woman, marries into their family and wreaks havoc among them.

title: Sukh Dukher Sansar
desc: Amar, the eldest of four, struggles to provide a better life to his younger siblings. However, things take a turn for the worse when his younger sister meets with an accident and is visually impaired.

title: Swapno
desc: A woman leaves a kind-hearted man owing to a misunderstanding and marries his younger brother. However, it turns out that he is the complete opposite of his elder brother.

title: Guru Ke Janai Pronam
desc: This is TV Show - Entertainment Category.
